message:
feat(core): implement resolution caching with LRU + SQLite backing

- Add ResolutionCache struct with in-memory LRU and SQLite persistence
- Implement DependencyGraph for transitive cache invalidation
- Add CacheKey for content-hash-based cache validation
- Add get_or_resolve() method for convenient cached resolution
- Add migration 010 for resolved_skill_cache and skill_dependency_graph tables
- Update SkillRepository trait to remove Send+Sync bounds (for GitSkillRepository compat)
- Add GitSkillRepository for Git-backed skill resolution
- 14 unit tests for caching functionality

This enables fast lookups for resolved skills (inheritance + composition applied)
with automatic invalidation when dependencies change.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
